name: Dijon Vinaigrette (Disney Kids)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients in a clean jar with a tight-fitting lid.
2. Shake well to mix everything together.
3. This recipe makes 1.5 cups of vinaigrette.
(Note: Reviewed in "Vegetables your kids will eat," Family Fun Magazine, May 1996. Simple salad dressings that kids can help prepare and enjoy.)
